title: mariscus owanii
intro: Mariscus owanii, also known as the Muhlenbergia filipes, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mariscus owanii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves or stems, which can be used to treat various ailments.
